note: render+sim fps (doom.wad attract demos, best-of-5, -nodraw) before/after the fixed-point inline+int64 change, on the network's weakest devices. End-to-end is within noise everywhere; the real wins are complexity/size/exactness, not fps.

primitiveMicrobench.note: isolated wasm FixedDiv, 2e8 iters, double path vs int64 path, ms (lower=faster). Chosen: int64.
